productDisplayName: Roxy Women Sneaky Classic Black Casual Shoes
description: These retro themed plaid sneakers from roxy give a high-fashion spin to your off-duty wardrobe. Sleek and minimal in design, this shoe cuts a neat silhouette. Wear this with a bright tonal T-shirt, skinny jeans and a structured blazer.UpperFabric upper for with synthetic overlaysGraphic print on the overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tonguePadded insole for instep comfortMidsolePU midsole with foxing for the toe boxOutsoleTextured rubber outsoleShoe careDo not store in direct sunlight
